synopsis:
The Han Solo Adventures is a Star Wars Legends novel by Brian Daley. It collects all three volumes of the Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures series
- Han Solo at Stars' End (1979)
- Han Solo's Revenge (1979)
- Han Solo and the Lost Legacy (1980)

The compendium was first published on April 22, 1992 by Del Rey.
title: The Han Solo Adventures
